step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the initial conclusion. Another valid reason supporting this is that while other tissues may adapt to fasting by utilizing ketone bodies or fatty acids, RBCs' inability to oxidize these compounds stems from their mitochondrial deficiency, further cementing glucose as their indispensable energy substrate.
